headline: Mondelēz CEO says M&A is harder as acquisition targets become ‘too expensive’
summary: The Oreo maker's top executive said high valuations mean "it's not really worth" making deals unless a brand can offer a "unique competitive advantage."

raw.headline: Mondelēz CEO says M&A is harder as acquisition targets become ‘too expensive’
raw.summary: The Oreo maker's top executive said high valuations mean "it's not really worth" making deals unless a brand can offer a "unique competitive advantage."

headline: EXCLUSIVE: Cocoa's Epic 70% Plunge Should Mean Cheaper Chocolate — So Why Are Americans Still Getting Hit At Checkout?
summary: Cocoa futures have fallen 63% in the past year. But with manufacturers locked into hedges at peak prices and West African tariffs intact, experts say Americans shouldn't expect cheaper chocolate until late 2026.

raw.headline: EXCLUSIVE: Cocoa's Epic 70% Plunge Should Mean Cheaper Chocolate — So Why Are Americans Still Getting Hit At Checkout?
